basic_details.job_title: AIIMS New Delhi Technical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), New Delhi
basic_details.short_information: AIIMS New Delhi is recruiting 1 Technical Officer on a temporary/contractual basis.

qualification.details: Only shortlisted candidates will be called for the interview. Upon selection, candidates must bring all original testimonials of educational qualifications and experience certificates. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview.
qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Life Sciences or related fields

how_to_apply: Interested candidates must send their CV along with the prescribed application format by post or email to the Principal Investigator on or before 21 July 2026 by 5:00 PM.
Address: Dr. Suneeta Meena Associate Professor Laboratory of Medicine, BM-33, New RAK OPD All India Institute of Medical Sciences, New Delhi
Duly filled Application Form (as per prescribed format)
Proof of Age and other relevant documents
important_instructions: This is a purely temporary/contractual position for 3 months. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. No TA/DA will be given for attending the interview. The decision of the selection committee will be final.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS New Delhi Technical Officer Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), New Delhi has invited applications for the post of Technical Officer under a short-term WHO-funded project in the Department of Laboratory Medicine. Download AIIMS New Delhi Technical Officer Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS New Delhi Technical Officer Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: AIIMS New Delhi is recruiting 1 Technical Officer on a temporary/contractual basis.

rows.all_india_institute_of_medical_sciences_: Piloting Proposed Priority Activities on Mitigating Bio risks and Governing Dual-Use Research (RULS-DUR)

content_sections.heading: AIIMS New Delhi Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

content_sections.heading: AIIMS New Delhi Technical Officer Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Only shortlisted candidates will be called for the interview. Upon selection, candidates must bring all original testimonials of educational qualifications and experience certificates. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview.

rows.details: Post Graduate Degree in Life Sciences or related fields
• Fluent in English and Hindi • Motivated, committed and able to work independently as well as in a team • Good communication and writing skills

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for AIIMS New Delhi Technical Officer Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Interested candidates must send their CV along with the prescribed application format by post or email to the Principal Investigator on or before 21 July 2026 by 5:00 PM. Email: [email protected] Address: Dr. Suneeta Meena Associate Professor Laboratory of Medicine, BM-33, New RAK OPD All India Institute of Medical Sciences, New Delhi Documents Required: Duly filled Application Form (as per prescribed format) Detailed CV / Bio-data Educational qualification certificates Experience certificates (if any) Proof of Age and other relevant documents

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for AIIMS New Delhi Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: This is a purely temporary/contractual position for 3 months. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. No TA/DA will be given for attending the interview. The decision of the selection committee will be final.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS New Delhi Technical Officer 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to send the application is 21 July 2026 by 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. What is the qualification required for Technical Officer at AIIMS New Delhi?
faq.answer: Essential: Post Graduate Degree in Life Sciences or related fields.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Technical Officer post in AIIMS New Delhi WHO Project?
faq.answer: The monthly salary is Rs. 40,000/-.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are there in AIIMS New Delhi Technical Officer Recruitment?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy for the Technical Officer position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for AIIMS New Delhi Technical Officer job?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 35 years.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for AIIMS New Delhi WHO Project Technical Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must send their CV along with the prescribed application format by post or email to [email protected] before the deadline.

faq.question: Q7. What is the duration of the Technical Officer position at AIIMS New Delhi?
faq.answer: The project duration is 3 months.

faq.question: Q8. Is prior experience mandatory for this AIIMS New Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: Prior experience is not mentioned as essential but good communication, writing skills, and teamwork ability are desirable.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent job at AIIMS New Delhi?
faq.answer: No. It is a purely temporary/contractual position for a short-term project.

faq.question: Q10. Who is the Principal Investigator for this WHO-funded project?
faq.answer: Dr. Suneeta Meena, Associate Professor, Department of Laboratory Medicine, AIIMS New Delhi.
